textByHash.b41fe608d2afba0d7d6390615cb8bf88ac55c7a8: Would you like to buy some crafting equipment?
textByHash.34ad607585e00f1bc25b63395ab08f16a138c6c0: Okay. Fare well on your travels.
textByHash.ecc4a4b9023b2e1c11094f7d3948e5b9e701b779: I know that one of his thugs has threatened to ruin my store if I don't cooperate with them!
textByHash.b723df9a4c034dba5abff2a4a6ec480d87dc5b49: He said he was a tailor, but those scissors looked more like a weapon than something used for Crafting.
textByHash.1196c23da46a0903f15cb19a89c0342467fd56c1: As long as I have my store, I'll keep selling my Crafting equipment! Would you like to buy any?
textByHash.04587705b17974a11adb4c09a5df1375ab64fdcf: So I see! Unfortunately, it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.
textByHash.2eec85416985c50947bdf3a9c22169c048847410: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
